examples: Infectious bronchitis generally begins with the symptoms of a common cold: runny nose, sore throat, fatigue, and chilliness.
As a bonfire dispels chilliness, so our solidarity drives away the enemy.
Still, with all the scolding and chilliness at home, he was a sweet and gentle child.
Mr Letwin's palpable niceness would provide a useful counterweight to Mr Howard's chilliness.
